name: 3d-printing-ops
description: AI-agent skills for practical 3D printing operations. Currently includes Klipper printer host operations; additional printer and workflow skills can be added over time.

skills.name: klipper-ops
skills.description: Safe, token-efficient Klipper printer host operations through typed MCP tools with portable shell fallbacks for status, bounded logs, config diff, backup, validation, atomic apply, rollback, and recovery.
skills.shortDescription: Typed Klipper MCP operations with safe portable fallbacks.
